0,"read_duration":331486,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":7515},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6810996307944407048","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看过最多遍的一本都市修仙小说。同类型小说本书目前只有鱼人二代的校花的贴身高手可以与之媲美。俩本书全篇用大白话写成。通俗易懂。希望越来越多的作者能采用这种写作方式。虽然四大名著闻名历史。但是剧情再精彩写作再优秀给人一种文绉绉的感觉。没有给人一种想接着看下去的欲望。总之这本书还可以吧，算得上比较成功的一本都市修仙小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1585808655,"group_id":"6488633879065267214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一生二死三肉白骨四洗髓五针丹成六针元婴七针分身八针可逆天","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2D9wFU0hKgL8E04T57iOExzLXwhtHUpfGctlStmjt6L","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2436121279070605","user_name":"吃瓜娱乐林仔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2436121279070605","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6488633879065267214","book_info":{"abstract":"从山上下来的少年，为何武功如此绝世，为何医术如此高超，他的神仙姐姐是谁？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/c8bc70cb8539acf3b39599157aeccd15","author":"心在流浪","author_id":"","book_id":"6488633879065267214","book_name":"护花高手在都市","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":27,\"name\":\"战神赘婿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27\u0026name=战神赘婿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026sourc
